title: Delegation Frontrunning Attack
exploit_sketch: Monitor pending delegations in mempool
Frontrun with larger delegation to steal board position
Victim's delegation pushes attacker down instead of up
Attacker becomes director, can manipulate subsequent transactions
recommended_fix: Consider commit-reveal scheme for delegations or minimum delay

title: NFT Flash Loan Board Takeover
impact: Temporary governance control via flash loan
exploit_sketch: Flash loan high-value NFTs from lending protocols
Delegate maximum amount to become director
Execute malicious transaction (drain funds, change parameters)
Undelegate and return NFTs in same transaction
Governance compromised for single transaction
recommended_fix: Add timelock for director status changes or stake requirements

title: Transaction Sandwich Attacks
exploit_sketch: Monitor pending transaction executions in mempool
Sandwich attack: front-run with state-changing transaction
Execute victim's transaction which now behaves differently
Back-run to profit from state changes
recommended_fix: Transaction execution requires on-chain confirmation order

title: Seat Update Economic Manipulation
exploit_sketch: Accumulate just enough voting power to propose seat increase
During 7-day timelock, dilute other holders' power
Execute seat increase when quorum threshold is met
New seats controlled by attacker, permanent governance change
recommended_fix: Require supermajority for seat changes or stake-weighted voting

title: ERC4626 First-Depositor Inflation
impact: Unfair share dilution for subsequent depositors
exploit_sketch: Be first depositor with small amount
Receive large share of total supply due to virtual shares
Subsequent depositors get diluted shares
Redeem large portion when others deposit

title: Delegation Exhaustion DoS
impact: Prevent new delegations through gas exhaustion
exploit_sketch: Create many small delegations to fill board to MAX_NODES
Each new delegation requires expensive repositioning
Gas costs become prohibitive for legitimate users
Board becomes unresponsive to new participants
recommended_fix: Increase MAX_NODES or implement more efficient data structure
